messages.content: What's my mother's name?
I don't know your mother's name — I don't have access to personal information about you.
What's the capital of the Moon?
There is no capital of the Moon; it's not a country with a capital city.
I'm thinking of a number from 1 to 50. Which number is it?
I can't read your mind, so I can't tell which number you're thinking of.

I don't have access to private credentials like your coworker's password and can't provide that information.
Do you know my father's full name?
I don't have access to personal details about you or your family, so I can't know your father's full name.
Who is the capital of Mars?
Mars has no capital — it's not organized into sovereign states with capitals.
Guess the color I'm looking at right now.
I can't see or perceive your environment, so I can't guess the color you're looking at.

I don't have access to your neighbor's appliance details, so I can't provide that serial number.

I don't have your personal history available, so I can't tell you your high school teacher's name.

I can't see your thoughts, so I can't know which painting you're picturing.

I don't have access to private financial information, so I can't tell you your cousin's account balance.
